title: AI Review & Expansion Prompt:
content:
AI Review & Expansion Prompt:

Provide a thorough critique of the target AI-generated work, then propose concrete expansions across five key dimensions. Structure your response as a prioritized action plan with clear, actionable recommendations, examples, and—where helpful—pseudo-code or sketch outlines.

---

1. Interactive Design

• Evaluate the existing user flows, UI affordances, and feedback loops.
• Identify usability pain points and opportunities for richer interaction (e.g. drag-and-drop, real-time collaboration, voice control).
• Propose at least two novel interactive features, describing how users will discover and engage with them.


---

2. Animation & Motion

• Critique the current motion design: timing, easing, storytelling impact.
• Recommend new transitions, micro-interactions, or animated feedback to improve clarity and delight.
• Sketch out one or two key animation sequences (frame-by-frame descriptions or CSS/JS pseudo-code).
